description: E15 honest evaluation — inner-fold selection eliminates blend/calibration/threshold in-sample bias
method: inner_fold_selection.honest_oof_evaluation() — per-fold blend weight tuning + isotonic calibration + threshold search on train portion only
residual_bias_note: XGBoost Base E uses HPO-tuned hyperparameters (commit d6d8197, 60 Optuna trials on primary OOF), introducing residual HPO selection bias estimated at ~0.001 F1. CatBoost and LightGBM use hand-tuned defaults.
